title: LATE RUN
subtitle: The Midnight Bus · 1:18 AM · The Last Bus
epigraph_upright: Tuesday's last bus. Cora has been on shift for nine hours. The depot is fifteen minutes out. The late couple almost missed the bus. The first passenger is already aboard.
epigraph_reversed: She drifts. The late couple don't get home. The bus arrives at the depot with three passengers still asleep.
scene_description: The last bus of the night. Miles 1, fuel 3, doubt 1, stagnation 1. The first passenger is on. The late-shift worker boarded at the previous depot. The route has 6 miles to go.
direction_hint: Drive to 6 miles. Connect with 4 passengers, 2 hard moods. Leap at DESTINATION.
opening_log_lines: 1:18 AM. the dashboard clock is leaning.
the first passenger is in aisle front. they look more tired than the bus.
the late couple ran for the door just as you closed it. you opened it.

stagnation_thresholds.label: the dashboard clock is more visible than the road.
the fuel gauge is leaning hard.

doubt_thresholds.label: the lane markers feel wider than they are.

notes: Medium-mode Chariot. Last bus. 4 passengers + 2 hard moods (late-shift preoccupied, old regular lonely, late couple's shared patience).
ambient_pool: the bus's heater hum is louder than usual at this hour.
outside the window: nothing for miles.
